overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban downtown. The player approaches a crosswalk, waits for several futuristic vehicles to pass, then crosses the street while surrounded by pedestrians and towering buildings with bright signage.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a cyberpunk city sidewalk at night, passing pedestrians dressed in formal and casual attire. The Ellison street sign is visible ahead mounted on a teal building, while orange safety railings line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow striped crosswalk and neon signage

futuristic black sports car drives through the intersection
traffic light changes to green walk signal

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk waiting for vehicles to clear before crossing

vertical traffic signal showing red stop light

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a wide urban intersection waiting to cross, with the yellow striped crosswalk stretching across the road. Several futuristic vehicles including a black sports car and large truck pass through the intersection while the Masala Studios sign glows on the right. The traffic light remains red until the final moments when it switches to green.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon-lit storefront entrance

events.description: begins crossing the street as walk signal turns green
reaches opposite sidewalk and continues walking past building entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow striped crosswalk and continuing along the opposite sidewalk toward a neon-lit entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket crossing the street in opposite direction

entered.detail: storefront entrance with bright pink and purple neon lighting and digital displays

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk as the walk signal turns green, moving toward the opposite sidewalk. The camera passes pedestrians coming from the other side and approaches a building entrance illuminated with vibrant pink and purple neon lights, while the Masala Studios sign recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a neon-lit urban sidewalk that leads across a bustling futuristic intersection. It begins by moving past pedestrians in formal and casual attire, passing orange safety railings and a teal building marked by an Ellison street sign. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, the movement pauses at a yellow-striped crosswalk while a black sports car and a large truck stream past under the glow of a Masala Studios sign. The scene then shifts into motion as the traffic light turns green, gliding across the street amidst oncoming pedestrians. Finally, the camera approaches the opposite sidewalk, moving toward a building entrance bathed in vibrant pink and purple neon lights as the intersection recedes behind.
